feat.name: Sacred Weapon
feat.text: You’re a living weapon honed to destroy fiends. Whenever you critically Strike a fiend, your attack deals an extra weapon damage die, and the fiend is enfeebled 2 and clumsy 2 until the beginning of your next turn.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
